script:
#!/bin/bash
set +e
echo '=== ts ==='; date -u +%FT%TZ

echo '=== Kaye manifest file presence ==='
ls -la /home/azureuser/kaye-teams-app/ 2>/dev/null
ls -la /home/azureuser/kayeai-teams-app/ 2>/dev/null
ls -la /home/azureuser/KayeAgent-teams-app/ 2>/dev/null
find /home/azureuser -maxdepth 3 -name 'manifest.json' -path '*kaye*' 2>/dev/null
find /home/azureuser -maxdepth 3 -name '*.zip' -path '*kaye*' 2>/dev/null

echo '=== Aixa manifest (template reference) ==='
ls -la /home/azureuser/aixa-teams-app/ 2>/dev/null
cat /home/azureuser/aixa-teams-app/manifest.json 2>/dev/null | head -40

echo '=== Mint AppPublisher token (for upload) ==='
RT_AP=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name yoomd-graph-refresh-token-appcatalog --query value -o tsv 2>/dev/null)
echo "appcatalog refresh token length: ${#RT_AP}"
AT_AP=$(curl -sS -X POST "https://login.microsoftonline.com/organizations/oauth2/v2.0/token" \
  --data-urlencode "client_id=9f4cd925-fcc7-4f42-8dc2-ae98bcad28a6" \
  --data-urlencode "grant_type=refresh_token" \
  --data-urlencode "refresh_token=$RT_AP" \
  --data-urlencode "scope=AppCatalog.ReadWrite.All offline_access" \
  2>/dev/null | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("access_token","") or ("ERR:"+str(d.get("error_description",d))[:200]))')
echo "AppPublisher access token length: ${#AT_AP}"
[ ${#AT_AP} -lt 200 ] && echo "AppPublisher token mint result: $AT_AP"

echo '=== Mint YooMD chat token (for install step) ==='
RT_YM=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name yoomd-graph-refresh-token --query value -o tsv 2>/dev/null)
echo "yoomd refresh token length: ${#RT_YM}"
AT_YM=$(curl -sS -X POST "https://login.microsoftonline.com/organizations/oauth2/v2.0/token" \
  --data-urlencode "client_id=14d82eec-204b-4c2f-b7e8-296a70dab67e" \
  --data-urlencode "grant_type=refresh_token" \
  --data-urlencode "refresh_token=$RT_YM" \
  --data-urlencode "scope=https://graph.microsoft.com/.default offline_access" \
  2>/dev/null | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("access_token","") or ("ERR:"+str(d.get("error_description",d))[:200]))')
echo "YooMD access token length: ${#AT_YM}"
[ ${#AT_YM} -lt 200 ] && echo "YooMD token mint result: $AT_YM"

echo '=== Search catalog WITH AppPublisher token for Kaye (in case prior search missed) ==='
for pattern in 'Kaye' 'kayeai' 'Elamparo'; do
  echo "--- pattern: $pattern ---"
  curl -sS -G "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps" \
    --data-urlencode "\$filter=contains(displayName,'${pattern}')" \
    --data-urlencode '$select=id,displayName,distributionMethod,externalId' \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer $AT_AP" 2>&1 | python3 -c 'import json,sys
try:
  d=json.load(sys.stdin)
  if d.get("error"):
    print("  ERROR:", d["error"].get("code"), str(d["error"].get("message",""))[:200])
  else:
    apps=d.get("value",[])
    print(f"  matches: {len(apps)}")
    for a in apps:
      print("   -", a.get("displayName"), "|", a.get("distributionMethod"), "| id=", a.get("id"), "| ext=", a.get("externalId"))
except Exception as e: print("parse-err:", e)' 2>&1
done
echo '===END==='
